Episodes.Title: Kathmandu Descent
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Vijay Mehta, Adolyn H. Dar
Episodes.Plot: A Pakistani airliner crashes in the Himalayas. And when their most vital piece of evidence fails to deliver, investigators scramble to find answers.

Episodes.Title: Impossible Pitch
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Daniel DeSanto, Philip Van Martin
Episodes.Plot: A cargo jet plummets to earth in the Swedish Arctic. And as investigators pore over the evidence, a terrifying picture of chaos and confusion emerges.

Episodes.Title: Taxiway Turmoil
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Greg Gransden
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Peter Nelson, Jeff Sinasac
Episodes.Plot: Blanketed by confusion and heavy fog, a DC-9 ends up at the wrong end of an active runway in Detroit, and directly in the path of an oncoming 727.

Episodes.Title: Runway Breakup
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Peter Findlay
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Marco Timpano, René Escobar Jr.
Episodes.Plot: Landing on a Caribbean island in a severe thunder storm, a Colombian airliner crashes short of the runway. Investigators need to find out why.

Episodes.Title: Icy Descent
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Peter St. Laurent
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Rico Tudico, Jonathan Maxwell Silver
Episodes.Plot: Investigators are stumped when a turboprop slams into an Argentine desert, and it's a microscopic filament that provides the first tangible clue.

Episodes.Title: No Warning
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Corey Shurge
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Taybion Nguyen, J.P. Galvez
Episodes.Plot: Investigators are stumped when a turboprop crashes into an Indonesian mountaintop.

Episodes.Title: Cockpit Killer
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Mark Robinson, Kwaku Adu-Poku
Episodes.Plot: When an African airliner mysteriously crashes, Namibian investigators rule out a host of possible causes before reaching a chilling conclusion.

Episodes.Title: Stormy Cockpit
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Peter St. Laurent
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, P. Rodney Barnes, Chris Sandiford
Episodes.Plot: A brand-new 737 falls from the sky over West Africa during a major storm, but investigators eventually discover weather had nothing to do with it.
